name: devops
description: Full-stack DevOps platform with React frontend and Node.js backend

scripts.install-all: npm install && npm --prefix client install && npm --prefix server install
scripts.dev: npm run dev:server & npm run dev:client
scripts.build: npm --prefix client run build && npm --prefix server run build
scripts.type-check: npm --prefix client run type-check && npm --prefix server run type-check
